betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Antimatter§f

§aMatter's destructive opposite — a stepping stone to antischrabidium and the deepest end-game!§f

§bAntimatter§f is a special gas held in cells or capsules. Key intermediate for antischrabidium, flashgold, and advanced materials. Stored in bulk via §bMagnetic Antimatter Containment Barrels§f.

§6Production§f:

§7[Particle Accelerator]§f (§e900 score§f)
§b• Hydrogen Ion Capsule§f + §bCopper Ion Capsule§f → §eAntiproton Capsule§f + §ePositron Capsule§f
§bThen§f (shapeless crafting): Antiproton Capsule + Positron Capsule + Empty Cell → §eAntimatter Cell§f

§7[Cyclotron]§f — produces varying amounts as byproduct of most recipes
§7[Loot]§f — antimatter cells can be found on spaceships

§6Key Uses§f:
§b• Antischrabidium§f — Particle Accelerator: Antimatter Capsule ×2 → Antischrabidium Capsule
§b• Muon Capsule§f — Antimatter Capsule + Hydrogen Ion Capsule
§b• Flashgold Billet§f — Antimatter Cell + Gold-198 Billet + Ionized Particles (shapeless)
§b• Flashlead Billet§f — Flashgold Billet + Lead-209 Billet + Antimatter Cell (shapeless)
§b• Antimatter Cluster§f — 9 Antimatter Cells (full crafting grid)
§b• Custom Nuke Rod§f — Antimatter Cell + Copper Plate + Aluminium Plate
§b• Antischrabidium Cell§f — Cyclotron: Box of Plutonium Dust + Antimatter Cell

§eTip§f: Antimatter cannot be stored in barrels — use the Magnetic Antimatter Containment Barrel for bulk storage!
